instructions.runTests: Tap the play button to run all tests.
instructions.discovery: Use the Network Discovery card to scan for devices on your network.

tooltips.linkStatus: Shows the physical link status and connection properties
tooltips.networkConfig: Displays IP configuration and DHCP information
tooltips.discovery: Scans your network to find connected devices
tooltips.gateway: Shows default gateway and connectivity status
tooltips.publicIp: Displays your public IP address and location
tooltips.dns: Tests DNS resolution and shows configured servers
tooltips.wifi: Shows WiFi connection details and signal strength
tooltips.cable: Tests Ethernet cable integrity and length

settings.theme: Choose between light, dark, or system theme
settings.interface: Select the network interface to monitor
settings.thresholds: Set warning and critical threshold values
